description: Customer-facing primary identifier used on bills and portals. Must be unique and immutable.
Canadian government identifier. Highly Confidential when stored in full; partial last-4 stored only when business need is documented. See SIN classifier backstop strategy.
Email is a CASL-relevant identifier. Marketing use requires an active Granted consent record.
Phone is a CASL-relevant identifier and subject to Do Not Call list management.
Canadian six-character postal code. Marketing analytics must use FSA-only (first three characters).
Residential service address. Combined with name produces re-identifiable PII.
Sub-FSA-precision coordinates. Higher sensitivity than postal code.
Last four digits of card PAN. Demo storage only; production stores tokenized references.
Last four digits of bank routing. Used for pre-authorized debit reconciliation only.
Monthly recurring amount per contract. Aggregated to MRR for management reporting.
Current consent state per type. Drives marketing eligibility and DSAR compliance.
External regulator-assigned case identifier. Required for reportable complaints.
